LanguageData.Ammo_65x48mmCreedmoor_FMJ.label: 6.5mm Creedmoor (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_65x48mmCreedmoor_FMJ.description: An intermediate centerfire rifle cartridge desinged for long range shooting.

LanguageData.Ammo_65x48mmCreedmoor_AP.description: An intermediate centerfire rifle cartridge desinged for long range shooting.

LanguageData.Ammo_65x52mmCarcano_FMJ.label: 6.5x52mm Carcano (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_65x52mmCarcano_FMJ.description: A rimless, bottle-necked rifle cartridge found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_65x52mmCarcano_AP.description: A rimless, bottle-necked rifle cartridge found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.

LanguageData.Ammo_65x52mmCarcano_HE.description: A rimless, bottle-necked rifle cartridge found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.
